strategy: Expect a Big Bad Hound on a random wizard at the start, so keep Health up early.
Kill the two brother minions, but know that once they are gone Tamworth throws a Hound spell every single Round, so do not stall afterward.
He resists Balance 80% and takes 16% more from Myth, Life, and Death, so bring one of those schools.
Blade a hitter while the minions are still up, then burst Tamworth quickly once you are ready so he cannot chain Hounds.
cheatNotes: At the start of the duel he casts Big Bad Hound at a random wizard.
Once both brother minions are gone, he opens every Round by cheat-casting a Hound spell (Storm, Heck, Blight, or Big Bad Hound).
